thread.title_full: Special Voter Registration Camps on November 23-24 | Ludhiana News - Times of India

author: TNN
title: Special Voter Registration Camps on November 23-24 | Ludhiana News - Times of India
text: Ludhiana: The district administration would organize special camps on Nov 23 and 24 at all polling booths to assist voters in submitting claims and objections for the special summary revision of electoral rolls with Jan 1, 2025, as the qualifying date.Deputy commissioner –cum-district election officer, Jitendra Jorwal, stated that the initiative aimed to ensure that no eligible voter was left behind. It would also help individuals to enrol for voter identity cards, make corrections in personal details, and add or delete names from the voter list. All booth-level officers would be present at the polling booths during these camps.Jorwal encouraged anyone who wished to register as a voter, get their name deleted from the voters' list, or change their address, to contact the Booth Level Officer (BLO) at the respective polling station and submit the necessary forms on the specified dates. He urged the public to take full advantage of these camps to become active participants in the democratic process. He emphasized that these camps would play a crucial role in strengthening the democratic system in the country.We also published the following articles recently300 non-residents in Kamptee cantonment voters list: Booth-level workersConcerns have been raised in Nagpur's Kamptee cantonment over voter list discrepancies. Around 300 individuals, primarily military personnel who have relocated, remain listed as voters. This issue, first identified during the Lok Sabha elections, persists in the assembly polls.115501089Special booth for leprosy-affected voters in JamtaraIn a move promoting inclusivity, the Election Commission has greenlit a special polling booth in Jamtara town for 57 leprosy-affected voters who expressed difficulties accessing regular booths. This initiative is part of a larger effort to ensure a comprehensive electoral process in the upcoming assembly elections.115426197Nagpur North Voters Face Bumpy Ride To Poll BoothVoters heading to Bhola High School in Nagpur North are facing a treacherous journey due to the abysmal condition of the only access road. Potholes, uneven surfaces, and ongoing flyover construction have turned the road into a single, congested lane.115462090
